name: @prune/retry-reframe
description: F5 — retry-vs-reframe advisor. At a rejection, prices a naive retry (re-run the same approach) against a cheap reframe (a different approach from history) and advises the path with the lower EXPECTED cost-per-success (cost / success-probability). The cost and success priors are caller-fed (from history / F1 / F11); the decision is deterministic expected-value arithmetic. Defaults to retry (the known path) when a prior or cost is missing. No fabricated numbers, no regex, no model.
